resources.string: This application helps you determine whether your phone usage is still normal or already excessive. Enter the number of hours of usage and select your main daily activity.

Phone Usage Analysis Result

Usage Time: %1$s hours
Activity: %2$s

Category: %3$s

Check your phone usage too with the Daily Screen Time app!

Daily Screen Time is a simple application designed to help users estimate whether their daily smartphone usage is still within a reasonable limit or not.

Users only need to enter the number of hours they use their phone and select their main activity, such as social media, gaming, or watching movies.

Based on this input, the application will display a result category such as normal, warning, or addicted. This result is only a simple indication and does not replace professional assessment.

This application was created as a learning medium as well as to increase user awareness of smartphone usage habits in daily life.

Copyright © 2026 Ni Komang Cahya Sari.
All rights reserved.
An illustration of someone using a smartphone with many notifications, highlighting the importance of controlling and tracking usage time.
